Avg Speed

Immaculate

Vibes

Three Steps. That's It.

If you can send a text, you can send DOG. It's that simple.

🔓
1

Unleash Your Wallet

Connect your Unisat wallet. It takes 3 seconds. We counted.

🐕 Such wallet. Very connect.
📝
2

Type @username + Amount

No copy-pasting 64-character addresses. Just type who gets the DOG.

🐕 Much simple. Wow.
🚀
3

Hit Send. Done.

DOG arrives instantly. No waiting 10 minutes for a block. Go touch grass.

🐕 Very speed. So instant.

Why RuneBolt? 🐕⚡

Because sending DOG should be fun, not a PhD thesis.

⚡

Instant. Like, Actually Instant.

Send DOG in milliseconds. Blink and you'll miss it. No cap.

🔒

Your Keys, Your Treats

Non-custodial means nobody touches your DOG. Not even us. Pinky promise.

₿

Bitcoin Native. No Bridges.

Built on Bitcoin L1. No wrapped tokens, no bridges to nowhere, no cap.

🏷️

@Username = Your Address

Send DOG to @satoshi like it's Venmo. Long addresses are so 2023.

🎁

Gift Links Go Brrr

Send DOG to anyone with a link. Even your grandma who thinks Bitcoin is a video game.

🧠

Zero Brain Cells Required

We handle channels, routing, and complexity. You just vibe and send.

✨✨⚡

Ready to send DOG at
the speed of light?

Join thousands of DOG holders who are already sending instant transfers. First 500 txs are free. No excuses.

No signup required. Just connect wallet and go brrrr.

RuneBolt🐕

Built for the DOG army. Much love. Very community. 🐕
